description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script to sync and update git submodules, update apt and install python-dev, python-pip, python3-dev, python3-pip, python-numpy, python3-numpy and g++. Define two stages: test and staging. In the test stage add a test job that executes "bash lifelib/tests/test_all.sh". In the staging stage add a staging job that runs "bash slsparse.cpp", then "python check.py" and "python3 check.py". No specific Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or rules are required.
